title: marrubium parviflorum subsp. oligodon
intro: Marrubium parviflorum subsp. oligodon is a subspecies of Marrubium parviflorum, a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Marrubium parviflorum subsp. oligodon include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
